label: KB Document Kind
description: Discriminates DOCUMENT instances by their conceptual role (CASE-346). Term-backed so values are constrained, discoverable via list_terms, and extendable via term-relations. Starter set is paper/playbook/guide; add more terms as the corpus reveals them. Distinct from the entity-shaped templates (DESIGN_DECISION, FIRESIDE, LESSON) which exist for YAC-written structured records, not markdown mirrors.

terms.label: Paper
terms.description: Long-form essay / survey / design discussion. Typically authored in flow; evolves over time. Examples: langgraph-survey, fts-architecture-fireside, ui-guidance.

terms.label: Playbook
terms.description: Operational procedure / workflow handler reference. Examples: case-workflow, bootstrap, build-app.

terms.label: Guide
terms.description: How-to / reference manual for a specific reader. Examples: technology-stack, wip-guide.
